query:
SELECT c.id, c.contractNumber, c.contractName, c.sectorKey, co.name as contractorName FROM contracts c LEFT JOIN contractors co ON c.contractorId = co.id LIMIT 10;
SELECT id, name, sectorKey FROM sectors LIMIT 10;
